posts.text: Out tomorrow from @simonbooks , RAMIN ABBAS HAS MAJOR QUESTIONS is a new YA novel about the intersection of faith and identity. Hit the link in my bio to read my full review! ☕: @drinkchapters 🕯️: @frostbeardstudio  #booktok #books #bookreviews #yafiction

An intense new #manga for fans of The Mandalorian and True Grit drops March 3 from @kanamanga_us. Check out my review of BLADES OF THE GUARDIANS Vol. 1 today on my blog - follow the link in my bio! ☕: @drinkchapters 🕯️: @frostbeardstudio  #booktok #mangatok #manga #mangareview

The third book in Michael P. Spradlin's WEB OF THE SPIDER series for young readers is now available from @simonbooks . Check out my review of this historical fiction piece for middle readers on my blog. Link is in my bio! ☕: @drinkchapters 🕯️: @frostbeardstudio  #booktok #bookreview #middlereaders
The latest addition to my little herd. Behold Robin. #guineapigsoftiktok

THE AFTERMYTH by Tracy Wolff comes out tomorrow from @Simon Books ! Read my review of this exciting new adventure series today on my blog - link in my bio! ☕️: @Chapters Tea & Company  🕯️: @Frostbeard Studio  #booktok #bookreview

Volume 1 of SCAVENGERS ANOTHER SKY goes on sale tomorrow from @Titan Manga . Hit the link in my bio to read my review of this quantum-powered military adventure. #manga #mangatok  ☕️: @Chapters Tea & Company  🕯️: @Frostbeard Studio

3 MINUTE BODYGUARD YOKO CHAN Vol. 1 drops tomorrow from @Titan Manga ! Read my review of this fast-paced action comedy - hit the link in my bio! ☕️: @Chapters Tea & Company  🕯️: @LeaVea Candles  #mangatok #mangareview
